_note: DERIVED from theme.css — the token allow-list below mirrors theme.css. Regenerate on change.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a daisyUI semantic class (btn-primary, bg-base-100) or var(--color-*).
Raw px value — use a Tailwind utility or a design-system token (--radius-*, --step-*).

x-ds._comment: Token catalog for resolving legal var() / class names. Derived from theme.css.

prototypeDesignLint._comment: Anti-patterns prototype's design-lint flags; these are brand-intentional exceptions — do not auto-fix.
knownBrandExceptions: cream-palette — base-100 #FBF7F0 is intentionally a pale, warm cream (the cozy paper surface), not an accidental near-white.
noise-texture — --noise: 1 (subtle grain) is on purpose, leaning into the hand-made vibe.
warm-family-clustering — primary (terracotta), accent (honey), and warning (amber) intentionally cluster in the warm family; the earthy 'hearth' palette is the point.
handwriting-display-font — Caveat (a handwriting script) is used for headings/wordmark only; body + UI text use Quicksand.
